approved_control.human_purpose: Move official cybernetic control facts to strict JSON.
approved_control.requested_transformation: Replace prose-backed control artifacts with schema-backed JSON control files.
non_goals: Long-term Markdown compatibility for official guard, compiler, or runtime inputs.
approved_control.how_we_know_purpose_was_met: A run directory can be validated, compiled, executed, and verified without Markdown control inputs.
approved_control.what_counts_as_done: Official JSON control files pass and Markdown control inputs are rejected.

required_outcomes.statement: Example control chain demonstrates JSON-only control facts.
